stemHtml: Which of the following statements about buffet or stall is correct?

options.a: With underslung engines, the use of the take-off/go-around power setting (TOGA) produces powerful nose-up pitching moments, increasing the risk of a stall.
options.b: Insufficient take-off flap increases the risk of encountering buffet but decreases the risk of a stall.
options.c: A higher rate of rotation on take-off or go-around decreases the risk of buffet or stall.
options.d: High bank angles decrease the risk of a stall.
